title: C Header Scope
description: Practice a small header-style declaration block.
learningGoals: Recognize include guards and extern declarations in C headers.

completionChecks.prompt: Why use the include guard names here?
completionChecks.explanation: The guard prevents the header body from being included more than once in a translation unit.

completionChecks.prompt: What does extern int counter; declare?
completionChecks.explanation: extern declares a name with external linkage without defining storage here.
